problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
hypothesis: If Mitochondrial membrane potential modulation is applied to colonize, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
